name: NVD Security Instructions (CVE Analysis)
description: Structured CVE analysis pairs from NVD — vulnerability analysis, severity assessment, affected systems, and remediation guidance in Llama instruction format.
sample_queries: What systems are affected by this vulnerability?
notes: Uses Llama [INST]..[/INST] format — extracted via _rows_llama_text(). Good for CVE triage and vulnerability assessment workflows.
